title: Painting Tooltip
description: Adds painting previews to tooltips so you can quickly identify and enjoy each artwork.
body:
Enhance your Minecraft experience with this texture pack that brings **painting previews directly into your tooltips**, making it easier than ever to identify and enjoy every artwork.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Jr_y3G3_BRk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Features:**
* **In-Tooltip Previews:** Hover over any painting item to see a small preview of the artwork. No more guessing which painting is which!
* **Easy Navigation:** Perfect for collectors, decorators, or anyone who wants to browse paintings efficiently.
* **Supports All Paintings:** Works with vanilla Minecraft paintings.
* **Lightweight & Smooth:** Minimal impact on performance while adding a polished, informative tooltip system.

This texture pack is ideal for players who want to **decorate, organize, and enjoy Minecraft paintings** without any confusion. Quickly see every painting’s title and artist at a glance!

if you wanna add some custom painting tooltip from another mod, feel free to DM [Planet Minecraft ↗](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bibekthelegend/)!
